title: RefRecord v1
description: One detected cross-project bead reference. Emitted per (source, target, location) tuple; duplicate mentions of the same target inside a single location collapse to one record, but the same target appearing in multiple locations emits multiple records. v1 surfaces cross-project references only — the identity rule may relax in v2.

target.description: Referenced bead ID. For unresolved external: deps this is the raw external:<project>:<suffix> string so agents can see the exact shape that failed to resolve.

location.description: Where inside the source bead the reference was found.

flags.description: Validation flags in fixed output order: broken, stale, orphaned_child, cross_project. Every v1 record carries cross_project because v1 only surfaces cross-project refs.
